name: gh-x
postCreateCommand: go mod download && go install honnef.co/go/tools/cmd/staticcheck@latest && go install github.com/fzipp/gocyclo/cmd/gocyclo@latest && go install github.com/uudashr/gocognit/cmd/gocognit@latest && go install github.com/go-gremlins/gremlins/cmd/gremlins@latest && go install golang.org/x/tools/cmd/deadcode@latest && go install golang.org/x/vuln/cmd/govulncheck@latest && go install github.com/go-critic/go-critic/cmd/gocritic@latest && go install github.com/kisielk/errcheck@latest
